notes: Active - extracts the username from the URL path /u/{username}, then fetches https://trello.com/1/Members/{username} (a public, unauthenticated Trello API endpoint that returns basic public member info) and renders the result in a draggable modal. The modal has no separate <h2> title element; data is rendered directly into a left pane with rows like 'Trello ID: ...'. Uses Trello's own official 'trello' account (https://trello.com/u/trello) as a stable public profile. If the API call fails (e.g. 401/404), the code calls alert('Error: ...') instead of showing the modal.

checks.comment: Confirm the Trello Members API was called
Modal content should include the Trello ID field label
